title: Un-posted Comments on Items
excerpt: Would it be possible to have a notification sent to individuals of the items they have un-posted updates on? This usually comes from our teams uploading files (which get saved automatically) but the updates don’t automat…

posts.author: polina.kurotskina (Polina Kurotskina)
posts.cookedHtml:
Would it be possible to have a notification sent to individuals of the items they have un-posted updates on? This usually comes from our teams uploading files (which get saved automatically) but the updates don’t automatically save.
Is there any way they could get notified of all the items that have their unposted comments to ensure movement of items?
